programme.title: Croc Watch and Hippo Watch with Steve Backshall - EP 2

Remarkable moments include the tagging of a formidable three-meter-long crocodile the unique dietary habits of hippos (and how they cause conflict with local farmers) and how vulnerable these creatures are to climate change.

programme.title: Quantum Leap S1 - EP 5
programme.desc: Set 30 years after Dr. Sam Beckett stepped into the Quantum Leap accelerator and vanished, follows a new team that must restart the project hoping to understand the mysteries behind the machine and its creator.

programme.title: Watson S1 - EP 10
programme.desc: Watson is thrown into a detective case when he is unsure whether the patient he is treating for one of the most rare ailments in the world, alien hand syndrome, is guilty of pushing his brother in front of a bus.

programme.title: Key Witness - EP 15
programme.desc: Li Na claims to hold information on Guo Ying's mother's death. Guo Ying follows her, but Li Na takes the chance to escape. While Guo Ying is left feeling vexed, she meets Yao Kang. Yao Kang instructs the police to investigate Li Na's whereabouts and tells Guo Ying to stop interfering. Yao Kang becomes nervous when he hears Guo Ying tell him Li Na has information about her mum's murderer.

programme.title: Key Witness - EP 16
programme.desc: Guo Ying finds a hidden package at Li Na's old house, and she finds Yao Kang's ring inside! Guo Ying has a hunch that her mother's death is related to her father. She goes home to ask Yao Kang, and he tries to explain. Ying Jie guesses their mum knew their father had betrayed the police and urges him to turn himself in, leading to his intention to kill. This revelation shocks Guo Ying.

programme.title: Dear Neighbours - EP 21
programme.desc: Mei Hao Yuan organises a 3rd resident meeting. Wei Ren announces that he will launch the tender, and wants Yan Xun to give a speech. Yan Xun is distracted, and instead he announces that he wants to retire from his position as Chairperson. Wei Ren is unhappy with Yan Xun's resignation at such a crucial time. He Fan comes to know that Xi Yue wants a divorce. He encourages Yan Xun to salvage the marriage, preventing further hurt to be caused.

programme.title: Dear Neighbours - EP 22
programme.desc: Xi Yue receives an invitation from her colleague to visit an exhibition preview. When Xi Yue attends the event, she finds out that the exhibit is filled with items that hold memories for her and Yan Xun. She finds out that this is part of Yan Xun's plan to regain her love. Will Xi Yue agree to reconcile with him? On the other hand, Ting Xuan is unable to accept that Wei Ren still has feelings for Zi Wei, and she initiates a breakup.

programme.title: My Fair Lady - EP 17
programme.desc: According to the legend, during the Period of the Warring States, there was a woman gifted with immense abilities. Her name is Zhong Wu Yan. Among the many talented individuals of that era, she stands out from the crowd, due in no small part to her knowledge of warfare, weapons and magic. Her gifts bring her to the attention of Emperor Qi, who takes her as his bride in order to help him manage the kingdom.

programme.title: Frontline - EP 5
programme.desc: Singapore’s declining fertility rate reflects a shift-having children is no longer a given, but a decision to be carefully weighed. Some choose not to have children due to rising costs, time pressures, and uncertainty about the future. Others struggle through loss and medical challenges in their attempt to conceive. At the same time, more women are giving birth in their 40s-why is this rising?

programme.title: Kid U Not - EP 5
programme.desc: Yutong and Chris learn that Mary is 170 years old. They get driven out of Chris’ home and run into Manle, who learns their true identity. Miss Golden tells them that they lose one bar of their life with each person’s discovery of their identity. Lose all ten and they die. To regain their youth, Yutong and Chris must complete missions to bring light into others’ lives.

programme.title: Talk of The Town - EP 24
programme.desc: A half-hour talk-show segment in Hello Singapore which brings together diverse voices and expert opinions to thought-provoking discussions on wide range of issues. Incorporating online polls which gather public opinions, the segment creates a space that allows for multi viewpoints in the studio from Monday to Friday.

programme.title: Heroes in White - EP 8
programme.desc: Shikeng discovers that the shophouse may be linked to a secret redevelopment plan and teams up with Qiting to secretly buy it under Renyuan Pharmaceutical without Weimin’s knowledge. Although Yingchen senses something is wrong, she is forced to reluctantly go along with their plan.

programme.title: Focus - EP 5
programme.desc: Tuk-tuks in Thailand, jeepneys in the Philippines, and angkots in Indonesia have long been part of daily commuting. With the rise of ride-hailing platforms and government pushes for electrification, will these street icons be phased out, or can they find a new place and continue on the road?

programme.title: Taste of Life - EP 1082
programme.desc: Chu-Tsai, Chao and his wife have five children. Devoted all his life into developing soy sauce products, Chu-Tsai very much hopes that one of his kids can follow his footsteps and take over his business, but he also respects their own passions and aspirations. Because of their father's invention dream, the Chao brother's lives are about to change.

programme.title: Thayamma Yenna Kaapaathuu! - EP 4

programme.title: Have A Nice Dream 2025 - EP 7
programme.desc: Taiwan’s east coast, known as the last pure land, enchants travelers with its blue seas and rich marine life. Locals share a mission to protect nature, preserve culture, and promote sustainable tourism. The region offers warm hospitality and quality stays. Influencer A-Zhe, famed for his Europe trek, explores Hualien and Taitung on foot, capturing the Pacific coast’s raw beauty on film.

programme.title: Hotel Del Luna - EP 25
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Korean) Manyue takes the limo to the afterlife with Qingming to see him off and asks Canxing to wait for her.

programme.title: The Legend of Zhuohua - EP 13

programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] The strict Narranmoda Boarding School admits four boys, segregated under strict supervision. Can the boys survive the haunting and uncover the school's dark secrets?

From there, Ivan is asked by his mother to find a partner. Until finally, Ivan, the barbershop owner, says, "Why don't you be my partner, and I introduce you to my mother?"

programme.title: Mahkotamu Ketinggalan di DC Cakung Queen
programme.desc: Keyla was shocked to meet Roy at the market. Roy accidentally saw Keyla, Keyla immediately ran into the market and accidentally hit Yudi in the market. The fruit that Yudi brought was all messed up. Keyla rushed to avoid Roy. Keyla wanted to find her family who had been separated for a long time.

programme.title: BINTANG PANTURA 6 - EP 9
programme.desc: Bintang Pantura 6 is back! The legendary 'Juragan' Soimah, joined by her trusty assistant Nunung and business partner Inul Daratista, is on a mission to find 40 talented contestants. Who will make the cut and finally perform on the stage of their dreams?

programme.title: DISEBELAH ADA SURGA - EP 2
programme.desc: The story of three young men named Andhika, Gading, and Uus. All three of them lack spiritual depth. They have spent their youth living carefree lives, indulging in pleasure without a care in the world about their future.

programme.title: UNGKAP HIKMAH DI BALIK DOSA - EP 32
programme.desc: Revealing the Wisdom Behind Sin is a project that assesses events or incidents from an Islamic perspective, revealing the wisdom behind sin.

programme.title: Mencari Tahu Isi Hati Cewek Gorengan
programme.desc: Rizky (Hardi Fadhillah) is forced into a shotgun wedding with Syifa (Jennifer Eve) due to a ridiculous misunderstanding: he accidentally entered the ladies' room and was accused of being a pervert. To make matters more 'fragrant,' Syifa is a fried-food vendor with a peculiar habit of farting whenever she pleases

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 181
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Salam Santun Akang Satpam Skin Oppa
programme.desc: Prita (Larasati Nugroho) is a Betawi girl obsessed with everything K-Pop. When she meets Jaka (Farhan Rasyid), who has an oriental look, she immediately calls him 'Oppa' and dreams of marrying him. However, her father has other plans, insisting she marry the local guy, Roni (Angga Putra).

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 635
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 129
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: Dosen Ganteng Bikin Hati Adalah Mawut
programme.desc: Kinara (Amanda Salmakhira) is a typical college student with a loyal boyfriend by her side. Her world is shaken when a handsome new lecturer (Mahdy Reza) joins her campus. While Kinara initially feels nothing for him, she is shocked to discover that her parents have already arranged for her to marry the young professor.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 181
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Cinta Pertama Belum Kelar
programme.desc: Raisa (Baiti Syaghaf) returns to her hometown to attend her older sister’s engagement party, only to be hit by a devastating realization: the groom-to-be, Raffi (Alex Rio), is her own ex-boyfriend. To maintain family peace, Raisa desperately tries to hide their past, even as her heart is torn apart.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 635
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: Kambing Daliman
programme.desc: he story begins with the success of Baskoro, a former film director who has just been elected as the Regent of Klaten. Daliman, a humble porter at Beringharjo Market, is overjoyed to see Baskoro on TV. Years ago, Daliman worked as an extra for Baskoro and even lent his goat to be slaughtered for a movie scene. Baskoro had promised to pay him back if the film succeeded, but unfortunately, the movie was a total failure. Now that Baskoro is in power, will Daliman get what he’s owed

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 130
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: TITIP RINDU BUAT TUKANG CUKUR
programme.desc: Isah (Andi Viola) is a humble barber who considers herself plain and overweight, while her sister Sofi is a stunning beauty. Despite their differences, both sisters find themselves falling for the same man, Bayu (Qausar Harta). Surprisingly, it's the quirky Isah who seems to attract all the attention.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 182
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Manis Manis Bau Amis Tapi Suka
programme.desc: Celine (Hana Saraswati) faces a family curse if she refuses to take over her grandmother's fish restaurant. Despite her severe fish phobia, she flees and nearly crashes into Dion (Marcel Chandrawinata), who is carrying a block of fish. The next day, Celine wakes up reeking of raw fish, causing everyone around her to stay far away.

programme.desc: Bella (Ochi Rosdiana), a wealthy and beautiful girl, steps out of an ATM only to be knocked over by Ahong (El Ryan Carlen), who is sprinting away from a persistent admirer named Wina. Bella is furious and berates him, but Ahong doesn't look back, leaving Bella fuming in the street.

programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan bual bicara yang menampilkan pelawak-pelawak terkenal Malaysia dan dihoskan oleh Hans Isaac.

programme.title: Onyomat Geset Go - EP 8
programme.desc: Rancagan menarik untuk tontonan seisi keluarga.

programme.title: Gelak Gempak - EP 8
programme.desc: Perjalanan pencarian pelawak "stand up" terunggul di Malaysia bermula bersama Dato’ Afdlin Shauki, Harith Iskander, Nabil and Douglas Lim di kelab-kelab komedi tempatan.

programme.title: Warna Live: Arena Panggang - EP 4
programme.desc: Siapakah yang paling handal memanggang dan siapakah yang bakal dipanggang?

programme.title: Kak Lina Ter-Over Take Over - EP 4
programme.desc: Saksikan gelagat Kak Lina Pom Pom yang kecoh dan lucu bersama para tetamu jemputan melakukan cabaran istimewa yang pasti mencuit hati anda sekeluarga.

programme.title: MLM Terbaik 2019 - EP 1
programme.desc: Rancangan komedi untuk tontonan semua.

programme.desc: Drama komedi seram tentang sepasang pencuri bertindak menggunakan seekor tuyul untuk mengembangkan jenayah mereka tapi perancangan mereka membawa mereka bertembung dengan pelbagai hantu yang tak disangka.

programme.title: Destinasi Ke Destinasi - EP 11
programme.desc: Rancangan menarik untuk golongan semua.

programme.title: Aku Bukan BIMBO - EP 3
programme.desc: Elsuraya percaya Azad adalah punca kematian ibu bapanya dalam satu kemalangan dan membenci lelaki itu yang dalam diam mencintainya. Perkara sebenar disimpan rapi oleh Azad dan sahabat baiknya, Dani Ikram.

programme.title: Pulau Ke Pulau - EP 13
programme.desc: Sebuah drama untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Joras & Stars - EP 1
programme.desc: Joras & Stars ialah sketsa bersama artis jemputan setiap minggu untuk menghiburkan penonton melalui sketsa yang kelakar.

programme.title: Dahlia - EP 21
programme.desc: Dahlia memiliki segalanya, namun semuanya musnah akibat sikap khianat kawan baiknya sendiri yang ingin merampas semua miliknya termasuk suami, anak & harta.

programme.title: Kennot Brain 2021 - EP 35
programme.desc: Saksikan Alif Farhan & Ain Edruce bersama tetamu jemputan mereka yang pasti kecoh sambil merungkai video-video pelik yang 'trending' pada minggu ini.

programme.title: Gado Gado 2 - EP 8
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan komedi untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Naluri Hati - EP 19

programme.title: Betul Ke Bohong Sayang - EP 11
programme.desc: Kesinambungan dari program popular "Betul Ke Bohong" yang menyaksikan pasangan-pasangan bersaing untuk mengelak dari dikenakan kejutan elektrik.

programme.title: Cekelat Tak Semanis Honey
programme.desc: Adam dan Maya kini telah berkahwin dan hidup bahagia, namun diuji video karaoke Adam dan video Smule Maya.

programme.title: Warung Sepahtu - EP 10
programme.desc: Jom lepak santai sambil sembang dan bergelak tawa bersama Jep, Shuib, Rahim & Pak Ya dalam Warung Sepahtu selain turut menampilkan tetamu undangan yang pasti menghiburkan.

programme.title: Kau Rasa? - EP 9
programme.desc: Rancangan 'prank' yang merakamkan reaksi spontan orang ramai dengan penampilan selebriti undangan.

programme.title: Sketso - EP 8
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan sketsa komedi tentang pencegahan kemalangan untuk pekerja di bawa khas oleh Pertubuhan Keselamatan Pekerja Sosial (PERKESO)

programme.title: #havocwarna - EP 22
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan yang menggabungkan sketsa, spontan, prank, zumba dan lain lain lagi

programme.title: Jihan Show - EP 8
programme.desc: Riuh rendah dibuatnya apabila Jihan berkumpul dengan teman-teman. Pelbagai topik jadi perbualan bila semua "girlfriends" bersatu.

programme.title: Geng Gajet - EP 5
programme.desc: Geng Gajet mengikuti sekumpulan rakan dari pelbagai latar belakang yang menyelesaikan masalah mereka setiap hari menggunakan kemahiran digital & pengekodan mereka.

programme.title: Warna Live: Arena Panggang - EP 1
programme.desc: Bergelak tawa bersama Nabil, Johan, Dato' Afdlin, Ajak Shiro, Jihan Muse dan ramai lagi dalam program 'membahan' bersama pelawak popular. Saksikan gelagat mereka yang pasti menghiburkan anda sekeluarga.

programme.title: Sepahtu Reunion Live 2019 - EP 5
programme.desc: Sebuah program menarik untuk tontona semua.

programme.title: Kalau Berani Kampung Stail - EP 10
programme.desc: Setiap minggu Sherry dan ketua kumpulan akan di bawa ke kampung yang berlainan bersama artis jemputan untuk menolong ketua kumpulan memenangi perlawanan mingguan

programme.title: Komediri S2 - EP 7
programme.desc: Bual bicara berbentuk komedi membariskan artis-artis jemputan daripada kalangan pelawak, selebriti, dan juga influencer untuk berkongsi cerita dan rasa.

programme.title: Opocot Next Level - EP 1

programme.title: Redah Kasi Pecah Ekstravaganza - EP 1
programme.desc: Redah Kasi Pecah Ekstravaganza musim kedua menampilkan Tauke, Ropi, Zaibo dan ramai lagi meredah kampung-kampung dan melakukan pelbagai aktiviti

programme.title: Ngaroot - EP 3
programme.desc: Polis Sentri ialah sebuah program variasi yang menampilkan 10 artis tanah air termasuk personaliti sosial media. Misi mereka adalah untuk berjaya dalam semua cabaran yang diberi.

programme.title: Chapalrela - EP 11

programme.title: Cik Bunga Encik Sombong - EP 11

programme.title: Sahebzaade
programme.desc: While both Raja and Rahul fall in love with Chinar, their mother urges them to unite and fight the man who killed their father. Release Year: 1992 Director: Ajay Kashyap

programme.title: FryDay
programme.desc: Rajiv a struggling salesman visits a married man's home to sell water purifiers, but chaos unfolds as secrets, lies, and unexpected twists turn a simple visit into a day of comic confusion. Release Year: 2018 Director: Abhishek Dogra

programme.title: Yeh Vaada Raha
programme.desc: Vikram's mother refuses to accept his relationship with Sunita due to her financial background. The couple decide to elope and meet with a horrible accident that separates them. Release Year: 1982 Director: Kapil Kapoor

programme.title: Laila Majnu
programme.desc: Two lovers from Kashmir are separated by family opposition and circumstances, leading Qais into obsession as their intense love story unfolds through pain, longing, and tragic destiny. Release Year: 1976 Director: Harnam Singh Rawail

programme.title: Tejas
programme.desc: Indian Air Force officer Tejas embarks on a risky mission to rescue an Indian spy from Pakistan. Along the way, she battles both formidable adversaries and haunting personal demons from her past. Release Year: 2023 Director: Sarvesh Mewara

programme.title: Aakhree Raasta
programme.desc: Released from prison after 24 years for a crime he did not commit, David discovers that the people who framed him are now prominent citizens. Release Year: 1986 Director: Bhagyaraj

programme.title: Phobia
programme.desc: Traumatized artist Mehak isolates herself after an assault. In a new home, her fear grows as terrifying visions suggest a dark presence haunting her fragile mind. Release Year: 2016 Director: Pavan Kirpalani Awards: 2017 Winner Technical Award- Best Sound Design- Vivek Sachidanand

programme.title: Haan Maine Bhi Pyaar Kiya
programme.desc: Shiv and Pooja share a happy marriage until she discovers his infidelity. When film star Raj enters her life, love, choices, and self-worth are tested unexpectedly by fate. Release Year: 2002 Director: Dharmesh Darshan Awards: 2003 Winner, Reader's Choice - Best Supporting ActreSS - Simone Singh

programme.title: Kuch Kuch Locha Hai
programme.desc: Praveen Patel, a 45-year-old married businessman, is approached by Shanaya, an actress, who wants to move in with him to prepare for a role. So he pretends to be single to impress her. Release Year: 2015 Director: Devang Dholakia

programme.title: 420 IPC
programme.desc: CA Keswani is arrested for bank fraud and forgery. Keswani hires Birbal, a lawyer, to fight his case, but Birbal realises that there's more to it than meets the eye. Release Year: 2021 Director: Manish Gupta

programme.title: Aakhree Raasta
programme.desc: Released from prison after 24 years for a crime he did not commit, David discovers that the people who framed him are now prominent citizens. Release Year: 1986 Director: Bhagyaraj

programme.title: Angaaray
programme.desc: After Aarti is assaulted by her employer, her brother Sanjay tries to avenge her but is killed. Grief-stricken yet determined, Aarti decides to fight back and bring her attacker to justice. Release Year: 1986 Director: Rajesh Seth, Rajesh Sethi

programme.title: Daas Dev
programme.desc: Dev, heir to a political legacy, struggles with power, love, and addiction as his relationships with Paro and Chandni spiral, leading him into a complex web of ambition and self-destruction Release Year: 2018 Director: Sudhir Mishra

programme.title: Enemmy
programme.desc: After five undercover police officers take up the task of protecting Mumbai from gang wars, they arrest their prime suspect, Mukhtar. Later, a CBI officer, Yugantar, investigates the case. Release Year: 2013 Director: Ashu Trikha

programme.title: Tejas
programme.desc: Indian Air Force officer Tejas embarks on a risky mission to rescue an Indian spy from Pakistan. Along the way, she battles both formidable adversaries and haunting personal demons from her past. Release Year: 2023 Director: Sarvesh Mewara

programme.title: Phir Aayi Hasseen Dillruba
programme.desc: Escaping from the police in Agra, Rani and Rishu decide to elope together. When their plan goes awry, Rani seeks a helping hand from a kind admirer.

programme.title: Helmet
programme.desc: A quirky comedy from the heartland of India, it touches upon a topic that is considered embarrassing for most people in India and will showcase the same in a hilariously entertaining manner.

programme.title: Maachis
programme.desc: Jaswant is arrested for a crime he did not commit. On seeing his friend's condition, Kripal joins an extremist group to bring down the government.

programme.title: Love Break Up Zindagi
programme.desc: A couple and many of their friends experience changes and challenges in their respective lives after attending a wedding.

programme.title: Extraaa Storiez Kgf: Chapter 2
programme.desc: Watch behind the scenes and meet the cast and crew of the movie.

programme.title: Anari
programme.desc: A rich girl appoints a simpleton, as her bodyguard. She soon falls in love with him, which creates havoc in his life.

programme.title: Karm
programme.desc: Asha and Arvind live together and soon start making plans for the new addition in the family. What she does not know is that Arvind has met a young woman named Neelam Shukla who wants to marry him.

programme.title: Bewakoofiyaan
programme.desc: Mohit a marketing whiz kid and Mayera, the financial brain with a penchant for shoes, are a couple in love but lacking money. Can you survive on just love and fresh air?

programme.title: Saiyaara
programme.desc: Passionate lovers navigate a rollercoaster romance, facing euphoric highs and crushing lows while desperately clinging to their tumultuous bond.

programme.title: Rathnan Prapancha
programme.desc: Rathnakara is a middle-class man in his late twenties who is unhappy with his life choices. One day, he gets a startling call that turns his world upside down.

programme.title: Tu Jhoothi Main Makkar
programme.desc: To earn extra cash, Mickey helps couples break up. However, life gets complicated when he falls for Tinni, a career woman with an independent streak.

programme.title: Saajan Chale Sasural
programme.desc: A village-based singer attempts to find love and fame in the big city.

programme.title: Chandigarh Kare Aashiqui
programme.desc: Manu, a bodybuilder from Chandigarh, India, falls in love with Maanvi, a Zumba teacher. All seems well until a revelation causes turmoil in their love story.

programme.title: Dhool Ka Phool
programme.desc: Mahesh and Meena fall in love but he marries another girl at his father's behest. When Meena takes their baby to Mahesh, he rejects her saying their relationship was a mistake.

programme.title: Har Dil Jo Pyar Karega
programme.desc: Raj, Pooja and Jhanvi are in a complicated love triangle. Pooja and Jhanvi love Raj. Raj loves Jhanvi but is misunderstood as Pooja's husband by their family. How will the confusion clear off?

programme.desc: Watch behind the scenes and meet the cast and crew of the movie.

programme.title: Bhool Bhulaiya 3
programme.desc: Rooh Baba steps into a spooky estate and faces two mysterious spirit, both claiming to be Manjulika.

programme.title: Bairaag
programme.desc: Manservant Bhola is secretly in love with his master's granddaughter but she is set to wed another. But the dowry-demanding groom absconds with the money and Bhola is sent to bring him back.

programme.title: Style
programme.desc: Best friends Bantu and Chantu try make two wealthy girls fall in love with them. However, they find out that the girls have been murdered and become prime suspects.

programme.title: Arjun Patiala
programme.desc: Arjun Patiala is a quirky small-town cop, who is fond of women and even more fond of his drinks. His original and unusual ideas help reduce crime rate in the town.

programme.desc: The story of a former boxer who quits boxing following a fallout with the authorities but goes on to coach a fisherwoman to fulfill his dream through her. Starring Madhavan.

programme.desc: A brilliant but troubled police inspector sets out to solve a confounding case, all while fighting to gain clarity into his troubled past.

programme.title: Aetbar
programme.desc: Dr. Ranveer tries to stop Ria, his daughter, from pursuing a romantic relationship with Aryan, an unpredictable and possessive man. She does not heed her father's words and continues dating him.

programme.title: La Grande Dictee 2026
programme.desc: This year, from the Palais de la decouverte, lovers of the French language will embark on a literary adventure on the theme of travel. Bernard Werber, Adelaide de Clermont-Tonnerre and Nathacha Appanah will write three texts and read them aloud. Several levels of difficulty will allow everyone to take part.

programme.title: Rassemblance - EP 3
programme.desc: A French artist of Algerian and Tunisian origins, it was the death of her grandmother that triggered her artistic gesture. Johanna Tordjman had to paint in order not to forget. Drawing on photographic archives, she chose to tell, through brushstrokes, the stories of heritage, immigration and the invisible memories of contemporary France.

programme.title: Des Racines Et Des Ailes - EP 2
programme.desc: A new generation of men and women have chosen to live and work on the Ponant islands. We head to Ouessant, Sein and Saint-Riom to meet the people who have opted for this isolated existence on islands that are sometimes difficult to access, and are both challenging and enchanting.

programme.title: 64' Actu
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's major daily news programme, decrypting the news! What you need to know: the Francophone view of the day's main events. Economics, social debates, international news: the expertise of our journalists. New weekend features: the French-speaking world, social networks, fake news, politics, sport...

programme.title: 64' Debat
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's major daily news programme, decrypting the news! What it's all about: the guests take an in-depth look at a key issue. programme.title: Sur Le Front - EP 9
programme.desc: The money invested by the French in booklets or life insurance contracts does not sleep. It is invested. But the contributors have no right of scrutiny over the investments made. If the banks promise investments without oil or «sustainable development», the system remains completely opaque. Investigation.

programme.title: Outremer.Story - EP 3
programme.desc: A journey a world away from the usual tourist hotspots for an immersive visit to Overseas France. Men and women, each treasuring a deep attachment to their land, act as our guides for this unique exploration of Overseas France and all the wealth of its culture, environment and heritage.

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil - EP 1806
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: Interieurs - EP 13
programme.desc: Anne-Catherine Verwaerde visits an unusual flea market in Rennes, in Ille-et-Vilaine. In Cotes-d'Armor, she meets a glassblower in her workshop.

programme.desc: The money invested by the French in booklets or life insurance contracts does not sleep. It is invested. But the contributors have no right of scrutiny over the investments made. If the banks promise investments without oil or «sustainable development», the system remains completely opaque. Investigation.

programme.desc: The 6am news bulletin (Paris time) by the France Televisions editorial team.

programme.title: Telematin
programme.desc: The latest news and laughter, 7 days a week!

programme.title: Chef Pays - EP 28
programme.desc: Chef Anthony Limery prepares chicken with kaffir lime and plantain.

programme.title: Slam
programme.desc: Three contestants compete on arrow-word grids that they try to fill in by finding the answers to the given clues. But to access the clues, they must first answer questions with a very particular characteristic: the answer is always a letter.

programme.title: Le Telejournal De Radio-Canada
programme.desc: The televised news programme from the Radio-Canada team.

programme.title: Interieurs - EP 13
programme.desc: Anne-Catherine Verwaerde visits an unusual flea market in Rennes, in Ille-et-Vilaine. In Cotes-d'Armor, she meets a glassblower in her workshop.

programme.title: Outremer.Story - EP 3
programme.desc: A journey a world away from the usual tourist hotspots for an immersive visit to Overseas France. Men and women, each treasuring a deep attachment to their land, act as our guides for this unique exploration of Overseas France and all the wealth of its culture, environment and heritage.

programme.title: Edmond Et Lucy - EP 2
programme.desc: Edmond the squirrel and Lucy the bear cub grew up together. They live in a majestic chestnut tree in the heart of the forest. With their friends they solve riddles and live thrilling adventures, with every day bringing new wonders to discover in the natural world around them.

programme.title: La Petite Pokou - EP 17
programme.desc: The High Priestess administers a mouthful of her potion to each of the Komians. Ebri Morrow's troops are at the gates of Kumassi. As they reach the pond, they put the final touches to their strategy. Pokou sets off for her third challenge.

programme.title: Il etait Une Fois... Ces Droles D'objets - EP 30
programme.desc: Watches, speakers, toilets... Maestro takes a fascinating look at some of our most everyday objects, both old and new. How exactly to they work? What is their history?

programme.title: L'imagier Anime De Koumi - EP 8
programme.desc: At 6 years old the cheerful mischievous Koumi dreams of knowing all the animals in the world. Thanks to her picture book, she's able to head off and meet them.

programme.title: Belles Comptines D'afrique - EP 8
programme.desc: In each episode, an animal from the African continent is highlighted in song.

programme.title: Oscar Et Malika, Toujours En Retard
programme.desc: Oscar and Malika walk to school together. Every morning, they face funny, absurd or ridiculous situations and live improbable adventures.

programme.title: Oscar Et Malika, Toujours En Retard
programme.desc: Oscar and Malika walk to school together. Every morning, they face funny, absurd or ridiculous situations and live improbable adventures.

programme.title: Tout Le Monde Veut Prendre Sa Place
programme.desc: The game where everyone wants to be a winner. One quiz, six candidates and, comfortably installed in his chair, one champion... whom everyone dreams of unseating!

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil - EP 1807
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: Au Bout De L'enquete, La Fin Du Crime Parfait ? - EP 32
programme.desc: August 1988. Delphine, 9 years old, leaves with her brother for a scout camp near Deauville. Holidays that will quickly turn into a nightmare. One night, while she was supposed to be sleeping peacefully in her tent, Delphine disappeared. Her lifeless body would be found a few days later.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: Meurtres a Font-Romeu
programme.desc: Font-Romeu is in shock: Father Baptiste has been murdered. Lieutenant Thomas Errelbaz investigates, but is out of his depth. Newly arrived from Paris, his colleague Julie Delpech is struggling to assert her authority. But she is convinced that a mysterious individual is settling their scores with the past.

programme.title: Foot! (1/2)
programme.desc: Match summaries, commentary and analyses, after each day of the Ligue 1 McDonald's, the French football championship.

programme.title: Foot! (2/2)
programme.desc: Match summaries, commentary and analyses, after each day of the Ligue 1 McDonald's, the French football championship.

programme.title: Petites Danseuses
programme.desc: What is life like for girls who dream of becoming prima ballerinas at the Paris Opera? Aged between six and ten, they dance with passion every day. But it is a real challenge growing up in a world with intensive work, demands and competitions at such a young age.

programme.title: Anushan
programme.desc: The only son of Tamil parents, 13-year-old Anushan much prefers rap to his native culture. When his uncle arrives from Sri Lanka, he finds himself sharing his room and his daily life with him for a few days.

programme.title: Six Degres - EP 8
programme.desc: To win his forgiveness, Julietta wants to join Francis at Saint-Isidore. Her visit will become a pretext for a family outing to Leon's childhood home...

programme.title: Six Degres - EP 9
programme.desc: Florence has to move to Trois-Rivieres and Leon would like to convince his parents to invite her to come and live with them. He is also very affected by Florence's feelings for Maggie.

programme.title: Six Degres - EP 10
programme.desc: When Francis returns, Florence discovers the photos from his documentary. She and Julietta organise a surprise exhibition at the cafe. Everyone praises Francis' excellent work...

programme.title: Le Grand Jt Des Territoires
programme.desc: Up-to-date news from the French regions presented by Cyril Viguier.

programme.title: Maghreb-Orient Express - EP 27

programme.title: Movie - Vedi
programme.desc: When Prabhakaran and his sister are ill-treated by the people for their father's mistake, he sends her to Kolkata. Years later, he needs to go there in order to save her from the enemies of his own.

programme.title: Movie - Orampo
programme.desc: Chandru races his autorickshaw for sport while his friend Bigilu acts as his mechanic. However, tragedy strikes when he begins to date Bigilu's niece while simultaneously challenging a rival racer.

programme.title: Movie - Aduthathu
programme.desc: Ten people are taken to an uninhabited island on the pretext of a reality show, wherein the survivor gets to win a huge cash prize.

programme.title: Movie - Agni Theertham
programme.desc: Agni Theertham is a 1990 Indian Tamil film released on 1990. The film is directed by Sri. Bharati, produced by B. Jayachandar and Music by Shankar Ganesh

programme.title: Fillers
programme.desc: Fillers

programme.title: Movie - Archana IAS
programme.desc: A widow brings up her daughter, Archana, by being a strict mother. The girl succeeds in passing the IAS exams and becomes a collector to take revenge on the man who cheated her mother.

programme.title: Movie - Kaathalar Dhinam
programme.desc: Raja and Roja meet in an internet chat room and fall in love but a series of mishaps prevent them from expressing their love for the other. Later, Raja learns the truth of her identity and is upset.

programme.title: Movie - Demonte Colony
programme.desc: After consuming liquor, four friends decide to do something interesting and visit a haunted bungalow. However, they do not realize that they have returned home with an evil spirit.

programme.title: Movie - Mugavari
programme.desc: Sridhar, an aspiring music director, has been struggling to get a foothold in the music industry for many years. He falls in love but is willing to put his relationship on a backburner for success.

programme.title: Movie - Neranja Manasu
programme.desc: After the villagers of Suriyakudi choose Ayyanar to be their saviour, he puts Sivanandi in jail for killing his father. However, after many years Sivanandi comes back to take his revenge.

programme.title: Movie - Vetri Mel Vetri
programme.desc: Kumar leads an aimless life and falls in love with Janaki and later goes on to become a renowned boxer. His marriage life with Janaki runs smooth until Janaki's friend Ramya enters their life.

programme.title: Movie - Akka
programme.desc: Seeta and Yashoda are orphaned when their alcoholic father kills their mother and goes to jail. Years later, he commits one more crime and enters their happy lives once again.

programme.title: Movie - Amma
programme.desc: Amma is a tamil feature film starring Saritha & prathap bothan

programme.title: Fillers
programme.desc: Fillers

programme.title: Movie - Good Luck
programme.desc: Surya, a carefree young man, lives in Malaysia with his brother and sister-in-law. He falls in love with Priya, a dancer, but problems ensue in their love life when she learns that he has a daughter.

programme.title: Movie - Vellai Yaanai
programme.desc: Vellai is a farmer from an economically self-sufficient village. But when he & the villagers take a bank's crop loan, they get caught in debt due to drought and low prices for crops. So few desperate farmers migrate to the city in search of a job. Can they pay off their debt? Or will they give up farming??

programme.title: Movie - 8aam Number Veedu
programme.desc: Pavan moves into a new house with his wife, Pallavi, and two children. When unnatural events begin to occur in the house, he consults a tantric who makes a stunning revelation about Pallavi.

programme.title: Movie - Kadhalukku Mariyadhai
programme.desc: Jeeva loves Mini but her three brothers end up beating him every time he meets her. The couple decides to elope against their parents' wishes.

programme.title: Movie - Naattamai
programme.desc: A wealthy man is known and revered for his just nature all over the region. His brother is married to an arrogant girl while there are others who are continuously plotting against this family.

programme.title: BWF Thomas & Uber Cup Finals 2026 Thomas Cup Finals
programme.desc: The Thomas & Uber Cup are the pinnacle of international team badminton, bringing together the world's top nations to battle for the prestigious titles. The Thomas Cup was first staged in 1948-49, and the Uber Cup was added for the first time in 1956-7. The Thomas Cup is the prize awarded for the World Men's Team Championships, while the Uber Cup is the prize for the World Women's Team Championships.

programme.title: ATP Tour Review Show 2026 Dallas Open
programme.desc: A look back at the best of the action from the Ford Center at The Star, Dallas.

programme.title: ATP Tour Review Show 2026 ABN Amro Open
programme.desc: A look back at the best of the action from the one of biggest and most prestigious sports events in the Netherlands.

programme.title: WTA Tour 2026 Open Capfinances Rouen Métropole (250) Final
programme.desc: The Open de Rouen is a professional women’s tennis tournament on the WTA Tour, established in 2022 and held at the Kindarena in Rouen, France. The tournament offers over $275,000 in total prize money and features top international talent.

programme.title: Heroines 2026
programme.desc: Heroines is a timeless series, that tables important discussion that challenges the status quo and celebrates the unique values of women’s sport. Each episode features a dedicated theme such as equality, maternity, leadership, mental health, fan engagement, activism and more, supported by exclusive interviews with leaders at the forefront of women’s sport.

programme.title: WTA Tour 2026 Mutua Madrid Open (1000) Final
programme.desc: The Mutua Madrid Open is a premier professional tennis tournament held annually in Madrid, Spain. It is played on outdoor clay courts at the Caja Mágica and is a key tournament in the European clay-court swing, often considered a crucial precursor to Roland-Garros.

programme.title: Badminton Unlimited 2026
programme.desc: Catch all the happenings in and around the world of badminton here on the show Badminton Unlimited.

programme.title: ATP Tour 2026 Mutua Madrid Open (1000) Final
programme.desc: The Mutua Madrid Open is a premier tournament held annually on clay courts at the Caja Mágica in Madrid, Spain. As one of three elite European clay-court Masters events, it features a 96-player singles draw and attracts top-tier talent.

programme.title: World Snooker C'ship 2026 Day 16 Afternoon Session: Final (8)
programme.desc: The World Snooker Championship is the most prestigious and longest-running professional snooker tournament, established in 1927. Played annually over 17 days at the Crucible Theatre in Sheffield, England, since 1977, it is the pinnacle of the sport, concluding the season's Triple Crown Series.

programme.title: World Snooker C'ship 2026 Day 16 Evening Session: Final (9)
programme.desc: The World Snooker Championship is the most prestigious and longest-running professional snooker tournament, established in 1927. Played annually over 17 days at the Crucible Theatre in Sheffield, England, since 1977, it is the pinnacle of the sport, concluding the season's Triple Crown Series.

programme.desc: The 2026 Tour of Hainan consists of 5 stages, covering a distance of 897.2 kilometers across Hainan province, starting in Haikou and concluding in Sanya, featuring 20 teams.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW - EP 38
programme.desc: I left here as a boy and I'm definitely coming back as a man. With 25 goals in Aston Villa's promotion-winning Championship season in 2018/19, Tammy Abraham still holds a special place in the hearts of Villa fans. Having risen through the ranks at Chelsea but then moved on by Thomas Tuchel, a determination to succeed saw him win plaudits wherever he played - For Roma and AC Milan in Serie A and lately for Besiktas, but Abraham has unfinished business in the Premier League.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 48
programme.desc: We speak to Dimitar Berbatov, a player whose elegance and composure left a lasting imprint on English football. Focusing on his Premier League years, we follow his rise at Tottenham Hotspur, where his effortless style first captivated fans, through to his trophy-laden spell at Manchester United, where moments of brilliance were often matched by intense scrutiny.

programme.title: 1-TO-11 - EP 5
programme.desc: Known simply as 'The Yak,' Yakubu takes on 1-to-11, selecting his ultimate lineup from the best players he shared the pitch with. A powerhouse striker with 95 Premier League goals across spells at Portsmouth, Middlesbrough, Everton, and Blackburn, he reflects on the teammates who made the biggest impression during his career. Expect a team full of strength, flair, and goalscoring pedigree.

programme.title: Manchester United vs Liverpool (MW35) (Live) - EP 348
programme.desc: Manchester United have won just three of their last 19 Premier League games against Liverpool (D9 L7), though are looking to complete the league double over the Reds for the first time since 2015-16.

programme.title: The Big Interview 2025/26 - EP 38
programme.desc: I left here as a boy and I’m definitely coming back as a man. With 25 goals in Aston Villa’s promotion-winning Championship season in 2018/19, Tammy Abraham still holds a special place in the hearts of Villa fans. Having risen through the ranks at Chelsea but then moved on by Thomas Tuchel, a determination to succeed saw him win plaudits wherever he played - For Roma and AC Milan in Serie A and lately for Besiktas, but Abraham has unfinished business in the Premier League.

programme.title: Newcastle United vs Brighton and Hove Albion (MW35) - EP 345
programme.desc: Newcastle have conceded a league-high 19 goals in the final 15 minutes of games in the Premier League this season. The Magpies are also five points worse off thanks to goals in this timeframe (6 gained, 11 lost), more than any other side.

programme.title: Wolverhampton Wanderers vs Sunderland (MW35) - EP 346
programme.desc: Wolves are unbeaten in their last seven home league games against Sunderland (W3 D4). This is the first time they’ve hosted them since a 0-0 draw in the Championship in December 2017, and first time in the Premier League since December 2011 (2-1).

programme.title: Brentford vs West Ham United (MW35) - EP 344
programme.desc: Brentford are winless in their last six Premier League home games (D4 L2), with each of the last three finishing level. They last drew four consecutive home league games in March/April 2021 in the Championship.

programme.title: Bournemouth vs Crystal Palace (MW35) - EP 343
programme.desc: Bournemouth are unbeaten in their last five Premier League games against Crystal Palace (W2 D3), having lost five in a row against the Eagles before this.

programme.title: Manchester United vs Liverpool (MW35) - EP 348
programme.desc: Manchester United have won just three of their last 19 Premier League games against Liverpool (D9 L7), though are looking to complete the league double over the Reds for the first time since 2015-16.

programme.title: Aston Villa vs Tottenham Hotspur (MW35) - EP 342
programme.desc: Spurs ended a 15-game winless run against Wolves last time out (1-0) and could record successive victories in the Premier League for the first time since their opening two matches of this season against Burnley (3-0) and Manchester City (2-0).

programme.title: Arsenal vs Fulham (MW35) - EP 347
programme.desc: Arsenal have never lost in 32 home league games against Fulham (W25 D7), the most any side has faced another without defeat in English Football League history.

programme.title: Manchester United vs Liverpool (MW35) - EP 348

programme.title: The Art Of... 2025/26 - EP 1
programme.desc: Once the unsung workhorses of English football, centre-backs have become some of the Premier League’s most influential figures. This week, The Art of... sits down with two-time Premier League winner Joleon Lescott to explore how the role has evolved from last-ditch defending to a position that now shapes games, systems and titles. Joleon breaks down some of the key attributes of the role, and examines how the duties of the centre-back have expanded over time.

programme.title: FIGHT SPORTS MMA Amanda Lino vs. Manon Fiorot
programme.desc: Check out exciting action from MMA organizations around the world. This episode features Amanda "MadDog" Lino vs. Manon Fiorot from EFC 83 in Pretoria, South Africa.

programme.title: MEGA Fights Carlos Manuel Baldomir vs. Arturo Gatti
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features welterweights Carlos Manuel Baldomir, aka 'Tata' (42-9, 12 KOs) vs. Arturo 'Thunder' Gatti (40-7, 31 KOs) in a bout to unify the WBC and IBA titles. The fight took place at Boardwalk Hall in Atlantic City, New Jersey, USA, on July 22, 2006.

programme.title: Karate 1 Premier League
programme.desc: Fukuoka, Japan welcomes the top talent in the world of martial arts when Karate 1 Premier League returns. Fukuoka will host athletes from across the globe including last season's Grand Winners such as Hikaru Ono and Ayaka Saito competing in their home country. The World Karate Federation expects another tremendous turnout, featuring Olympic medalists and world-ranked competitors, when the Karate 1 Premier League visits the port city of Fukuoka, Japan, on FIGHT SPORTS.

programme.title: BWF Martial Arts
programme.desc: This episode features highlights from the CMX Weapons Championship and the Men's Forms Championship at the ISKA US Open Championships held at Disney World, Orlando, FL, USA.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! James Kirkland vs. Eromosele Albert
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is the 21-0 James Kirkland facing off with the 21-1 Eromosele Albert. Just a little over a minute into this bout, following a combination of punches, the bout comes to a close.

programme.title: MEGA Fights Jan Zaveck vs. Andre Berto
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features the IBF Welterweight title bout, Jan Zaveck, aka 'Mr. Sympathicus', (31-1, 18 KOs) vs. Andre Berto (27-1, 21 KOs) from Beau Rivage Resort and Casino in Biloxi, Mississippi, USA, on September 3, 2011. Andre Berto, coming off losing the WBC title to Victor Ortiz, was looking for vengeance against Zaveck.

programme.title: XMA
programme.desc: In this episode we follow one of our martial artists as he goes through a grueling tournament and how he uses technology to help him prepare for it.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Joe Calzaghe vs. Roy Jones, Jr.
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is a light heavyweight championship fight featuring Joe Calzaghe and Roy Jones, Jr. This epic bout would prove to be the last of Calzage's career. Many wanted him to retire because he had nothing left to prove, and Calzaghe would officially do so 3 months later. Also on the card, Chris Arreola shows everyone why he is a heavyweight contender.

programme.title: Judo for the World
programme.desc: Judo for the World features the best competitors in the sport as they compete in a global tour for an opportunity to vie for the gold in the World Judo Championship. In this episode we see the best Judo from the Hague Grand Prix and we follow some of Netherlands' judo heroes as they try to mark the event with a medal tally to be proud of.

programme.title: Pariah: Sonny Liston
programme.desc: Was Sonny Liston murdered? This four-part documentary series explores the life and untimely death of boxing legend Charles 'Sonny' Liston, who became the heavyweight champion of the world when he knocked out Floyd Patterson in 1962. Unfortunately, just eight years later, he was found dead in his Las Vegas home from an alleged heroin overdose. Suspicion regarding the real cause of his death has continued to this day. Episode 1 of 4.

This episode features a Super Welterweight, 10 Round contest featuring Joel Julio (34-2, 31 KOs) vs.undefeated James Kirkland, aka 'Mandingo Warrior' (24-0, 21 KOs) from the HP Pavilion in San Jose, California, USA on March 3, 2009.

programme.title: Fight Quest
programme.desc: Episode 12: Kerala, India - Hosts Jimmy Smith and Doug Anderson learn the Fight Discipline of Kalarippayattu and the Martial Art of Sword, Shield, Sticks, Open Hand and Kicks with Master Sureshan Nambiar.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Keith Thurman vs. Carlos Quintana
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is the undefeated Keith Thurman taking on Carlos Quintana. Also on the card, kickboxing super heavyweight legend Daniel Ghita faces off against Brice Guidon.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: Top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Show 5 features Hakuho, Aoiyama, Asanoyama and Kakuryu from the Osaka Prefectural Gymnasium in Osaka, Japan.

programme.title: Karate 1 Premier League
programme.desc: Fukuoka, Japan welcomes the top talent in the world of martial arts when Karate 1 Premier League returns. Fukuoka will host athletes from across the globe including last season's Grand Winners such as Hikaru Ono and Ayaka Saito competing in their home country. The World Karate Federation expects another tremendous turnout, featuring Olympic medalists and world-ranked competitors, when the Karate 1 Premier League visits the port city of Fukuoka, Japan, on FIGHT SPORTS.

programme.title: Pariah: Sonny Liston
programme.desc: Was Sonny Liston murdered? This four-part documentary series explores the life and untimely death of boxing legend Charles 'Sonny' Liston, who became the heavyweight champion of the world when he knocked out Floyd Patterson in 1962. Unfortunately, just eight years later, he was found dead in his Las Vegas home from an alleged heroin overdose. Suspicion regarding the real cause of his death has continued to this day. Episode 2 of 4.

programme.title: Bluey (S1) - EP 26
programme.desc: As Mum goes for a walk along the beach, Bluey runs to catch up with her. Along the way, she has a series of encounters that both excite and test her in her first solo adventure.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 11
programme.desc: The Squirrels find Duggee's cheerleader pompoms, so he shows them his old moves. Time to practice: Duggee at the chess board, the Squirrels as a squad. There's a big match ahead...

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 12
programme.desc: When they're accidentally shut in the shed, Duggee shows the Squirrels how to make the time pass with calm breathing and made-up games. The Squirrels cope so well. Does Duggee?

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 13
programme.desc: The Squirrels haven't been making good choices round the messy clubhouse. With Duggee's help, they start to get it right. But not before sending Roly's imagination into overdrive!

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 14
programme.desc: Duggee loves to shop local, so the Big Shop is a Big Deal for him. He's over-excited and wants two of everything. The Squirrels have to remind him 'we only popped in for milk!'

programme.desc: King Tiger and the Jelly wonder what Duggee has planned for today. Tag wants a snack, Enid has a musical cheese chase, and Norrie has a haircut.

programme.title: BARBAPAPA - One Big Happy Family! S1 - EP 122
programme.desc: Barbabright acts strangely. What is he hiding ? The Barbabbabies will do anything to find out. // The Barbapapa decide to save energy. But their efforts are undermined by Barbabright and Barbabelle who build a secret energy-consuming project.

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space S1 - EP 105
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy & Tia find a lost toy and vow to return it to its owner. // Kai is super excited to ride the Nebulator, but Tim isn't so sure. // Tim and Kai try to photograph the illusive SpaceBug.

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space S1 - EP 106
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy and Tia get lost at a play centre. // Tim tries to find a new rocket that's perfect for him. // Tim tries to bend all the rules when Terri comes to babysit.

programme.title: DORA S4 - EP 406
programme.desc: Dora, Boots, and Diego help a pair of spectacled bear brothers build an awesome nest for their Mami! // Dora, Boots, and Diego help a lost, baby lizard get home to its parents!

programme.title: DORA S4 - EP 407
programme.desc: Dora, Boots, and Mami search for magical gems and a secret pyramid with their new friend, Patli! // Dora and friends save their Abuelas in time to celebrate Abuela Adventure Day!

programme.title: Peppa Pig S2 - EP 208
programme.desc: Peppa and her family are having a picnic. Mr Zebra the Postman and Zoe Zebra are having a picnic too, so they decide to have one big picnic. When it's home time, Peppa leaves her teddy behind.

programme.title: Peppa Pig S2 - EP 209
programme.desc: There's a new pupil at the playgroup, Emily Elephant. Everybody wants to be her friend because she is very good at building blocks and can make a loud noise with her trunk.

programme.title: Peppa Pig S2 - EP 210
programme.desc: George and Rebecca Rabbit's little brother Richard each have a toy dinosaur but they are not very good at sharing their toys. Mummy Pig shows them that they can have much more fun at the playground if they play together, just like their big sisters.

programme.title: Peppa Pig S2 - EP 211
programme.desc: Peppa and her family and friends are playing at the pond with their toy boats. Everyone has a boat to play with except Rebecca Rabbit. Daddy Pig makes Rebecca a boat out of newspaper. Rebecca's paper boat is so nice; everyone wants one.

programme.title: Peppa Pig S2 - EP 212
programme.desc: The birds keep eating the seeds from Grandpa Pig's flower garden. Peppa and George make a scarecrow, which stops the birds from eating. But Peppa is worried that the birds are hungry, so Granny Pig gives the birdies a birdfeeder with their own seeds.

programme.title: Peppa Pig S2 - EP 213
programme.desc: Peppa and her school friends are making a time capsule. They each put one of their favourite things inside and bury it in the school garden. The children discover that their parents made a time capsule many years ago.

programme.title: Peppa Pig S2 - EP 214
programme.desc: Peppa and George help Mummy Pig tidy up the breakfast things. Mummy Pig tells them that bottles go into a special green box to be recycled. Old newspapers go in a red box and tins go in a blue box. Peppa and George have fun filling the boxes.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S5 - EP 505
programme.desc: Pickle is putting on a magic show for all of Axle City! But when Crusher accidentally makes a magical mistake, it's up to Blaze and Pickle to fix the magic and save their friends! Abra-ka-Pickle!

programme.title: PAW Patrol S3 - EP 307
programme.desc: Apollo the Super Pup comes to Adventure Bay, in Rubble's dream. The pups must rescue their super hero! // Raimundo's dancing hippos shake, rattle, and roll the big top down. The Paw Patrol rebuild just in time for the big show!

programme.title: PAW Patrol S8 - EP 803
programme.desc: Rubble dreams that he's been taken aboard a spaceship and meets his alien double. When the ship crashes on an alien planet, he needs help.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew S4 - EP 404
programme.desc: When Grandpa Gravel is feeling under the weather, Rubble & Crew step in to make his signature soup.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew S4 - EP 404
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew want to help open a new restaurant for everyone at the Buddy Walk Race... but they can't decide what kind of restaurant to build!

programme.title: Rubble & Crew S3 - EP 309
programme.desc: Farmer Zoe has a new goat on her farm! But when she can't find the singing goat, the pups team up with Park Ranger Rose.

programme.title: Mr. Crocodile S1 - EP 111
programme.desc: Mr. Crocodile joins gymnastics club because Daisy loves it. // Mr. Crocodile and Daisy help Gigi and Roland find separate homes when they don't want to share a tree anymore.

programme.title: BARBAPAPA - One Big Happy Family! S2 - EP 208
programme.desc: Barbalala and the family life! / Barbabright and Barbabeau have designed a huge wooden toy powered by an engine using bio oil.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia S1 - EP 23
programme.desc: Aja and Krel travel into their parents’ memories in pursuit of Morando - and the truth about Gaylen’s Core. But when the King and Queen’s lives are jeopardized, a trusted ally makes a sacrifice that will change the team forever.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia S1 - EP 24
programme.desc: With their parents nearly regenerated and Morando in pursuit of Gaylen’s Core, Aja, Krel, and Vex unite with Toby and Arrgh on a quest into the depths of Trollmarket to unearth the relic before it ends up in the wrong hands.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge S3 - EP 74
programme.desc: The riders realize the Flyers are using the Deathsong to capture Singetails and plan a rescue mission to liberate them

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge S3 - EP 75
programme.desc: When Stoick is shot down Hiccup and the riders race back to Berk to help

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge S3 - EP 76
programme.desc: The riders race to Vanaheim and discover the Flyers have ransacked the Island

programme.title: Turbo F.A.S.T. S1 - EP 25
programme.desc: Hardcase follows the crew to the desert and goes to extreme lengths attempting to finally get his revenge on Turbo. // White Shadow loses his good-luck charm and spirals into a streak of terrible luck and the crew must help him find it before things get any worse.

programme.title: Turbo F.A.S.T. S1 - EP 26
programme.desc: During a visit to a racing convention Turbo is kidnapped by an overzealous fan and it's up to the rest of the FAST crew to save him. // Turbo throws a wild race for his fellow insects, but is surprised when his old nemesis, Guy Gagne, returns for a rematch.

programme.title: Archibald's Next Big Thing S1 - EP 26
programme.desc: Archibald and Bea plan another couple's long overdue honeymoon. Is a tornado coming to Crackridge? Archibald sure seems to think so.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S2 - EP 49
programme.desc: Noddy's delighted to be given a diabolo by Big Ears. But when Noddy tries it out for the first time, the diabolo crashes and breaks in two. Even worse, when Noddy goes to retrieve the two halves, he finds that they're both missing! Noddy needs to investigate. Where is his new toy?

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S2 - EP 50
programme.desc: Queen Sparklewings invites the toys to play a game of Catch the Flag at the castle. But when the special trophy goes missing, Noddy has to investigate. Where is the vanished trophy?

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S2 - EP 51
programme.desc: When Train hears cows near the railway tracks, he's worried that he might scare them and he insists on going really slow. Trouble is there's a load of Builders on board who need to get to Brickabuild fast. Noddy decides to investigate. Where are the lost cows?

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S2 - EP 52
programme.desc: There's a race at the loop-the-loop. Deltoid brings the prize for the winner: a beautiful model of the loop the loop circuit made by Pat Pat and Smartysaurus. All the toys are very excited, but before the race starts the tyres of Deltoid's tribike are burst! Could it be one of the contestants trying to prevent him from winning the race? Noddy needs to find out so that the race can take place.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales S1 - EP 21
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Rhino didn't charge and he couldn't see very well at all. Poor old Rhino really wanted to be invited to the Dance of the Horns up on the plains with Buffalo and all the other horned animals. But Rhino didn't have a horn, so he wasn't allowed. The Monkeys decide to help Rhino and make him a horn from a piece of old wood. But when Rhino wakes up he doesn't know what it is. ‘Aargh! Thing on the end of my nose! CHAAaarge!' And that's Why Rhino Charges.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales S1 - EP 22
programme.desc: You see Caterpillar was never in a hurry. When all the animals were racing around Tinga Tinga getting ready for the Best-dressed parade, Caterpillar was happy to sit in a tree and munch on leaves saying ‘Po-le, po-le, slowly, slowly, good things come to those who wait'. Then one day the rains come and Caterpillar disappears into a cocoon. ‘What's happening?' questions Elephant. ‘Wait and see' says Tortoise wisely ‘Wait and See'.

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service S3 - EP 3
programme.desc: Julian is very excited about the Sealife Awareness Day at Greendale School. While he's talking to Pat about it, his dad gets a call from Ben - a special delivery! Pat discovers it's a giant inflatable shark which is to be the surprise centrepiece of the Sealife day. But when Pat stops to help Alf mend a gate, a mix-up with parcel tape ends up with the whale accidentally inflating and floating off...

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service S3 - EP 4
programme.desc: Pat must deliver Ben to Greendale School, dressed as superhero, The Blue Flash. But Ben keeps stopping to help people on the way and his costume gets increasingly ruined! Meanwhile at the school, Julian can't wait to meet his hero but Sarah Gilbertson insists that The Blue Flash isn't real... At last Pat arrives at the school with Ben wearing a new costume hastily cobbled together by Pat. Julian isn't fooled. Looks like The Blue Flash isn't real after all...

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car S2 - EP 41
programme.desc: Roary is in a mischievous mood and keeps crashing into things. Big Chris has a great idea how Roary can burn up all his energy and be helpful at the same time!

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car S2 - EP 42
programme.desc: Farmer Green and FB are very nervous about going to Mama Mia's garden party. James and the other cars offer to teach them how to behave at such an event. But everything doesn't quite go to plan…

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car S2 - EP 43
programme.desc: Big Chris has agreed to do a parachute jump for charity but loses his nerve on the big day. Can Roary talk him through it, just like Big Chris did for him when he got scared?

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car S2 - EP 44
programme.desc: The brass band booked for the Silver Hatch parade have cancelled. Mr Carburettor will be furious if he doesn't have music at his parade. Roary and his friends think up an ingenious plan...

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal S1 - EP 1
programme.desc: Kelp is swept by an ocean current to the shore of Unicorn Land where he sees a majestic creature on a cliff that looks just like him, but not like his Narwhal family under the sea. Kelp tells his family he’s a unicorn. / Kelp returns to Unicorn Land where he meets Pixie and Juniper, who show him around and introduce him to unicorn spark and magic.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal S1 - EP 2
programme.desc: When Kelp is introduced to crunchy tacos in Unicorn Land, he must use his bubble sparks to bring them back to his family underwater. / Kelp’s unicorn friends are going to teach him Swishbee on land. But it rains and the game is called off until Kelp shows them that playing in the water can be even more fun.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S2 - EP 26
programme.desc: Feline popstar sensation Fluffy Flufferton is performing a concert at the Dollhouse Hotel, and Gabby unboxes tickets to see her! Gabby meets Fluffy and discovers that she’s afraid to try new things because she doesn’t want to make mistakes-why mess with perfection? But with the help of the Gabby Cats, Fluffy learns how to fail fantastically and be the most fluff-tastic version of herself. For our Cat of the Day segment, DJ Catnip sings a song about the Dollhouse Hotel.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S2 - EP 27
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes a tin full of Cakey-like cupcake kitties, she realizes... Cakey's Cousins are coming to visit! Cakey welcomes his Cousins to the dollhouse and leads them through a fun-filled itinerary of activities, but quickly realizes his cousins have an agenda of their own. For our Gabby Cat of the Day segment, Pillow Cat sings a song!

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders S1 - EP 1
programme.desc: When the Rescue Riders save Viking chief Duggard, they’re invited to visit his village of Huttsgalor, where they must prove they're kind and helpful.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders S1 - EP 2
programme.desc: Dak's lack of planning gets him, Cutter and Winger lost with Elbone in the Maze Caves, and Leyla's overthinking threatens the effort to rescue them.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go S1 - EP 1
programme.desc: Ari moves in to Harmony Harbor, but notices something strange involving a group of kids, a Noodle Truck chef and her pet squirrel. / After Ari discovers the secret of Team Zenko Go, he asks to join the crew. But first he must learn the importance of teamwork.

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries S1 - EP 1
programme.desc: When Phoebe accidentally knocks Harper's soccer cleat off the balcony before the big game, the Dew Drops must venture into the city to retrieve the cleat. / When Dylan starts practicing magic tricks, Athena thinks his magic is real! But when the Dew Drops investigate his "magic hat," they accidentally break it and must fix it before Dylan’s magic show for the neighborhood kids.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go! S1 - EP 1

Thanks to Tag’s handiness - and one of Lady Lydia’s hats - they make it to the party just in time. \ Pawston’s new canine mail carrier keeps getting chased by dogs, so Tag and Scooch have to help him deliver the mail.

programme.desc: When the Rescue Riders save Viking chief Duggard, they’re invited to visit his village of Huttsgalor, where they must prove they're kind and helpful.

programme.title: Cleopatra In Space S1 - EP 1

programme.desc: After Hiccup is shot down on a remote island while searching for Viggo and the Dragon Hunters, he questions Dagur's intentions to rescue him.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge S2 - EP 28

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge S2 - EP 29

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business S2 - EP 38
programme.desc: Finally promoted to CEO, Boss Baby sets his sights on achieving 100% Baby Love, while dealing with the annoying Puppies and Preeks who rented Baby Corp office space while Boss was gone. Tim and Danny become local heroes after saving a baby's life.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business S2 - EP 39
programme.desc: Boss Baby encounters a new threat to Baby Love: an adorable Baby TV show starring Pyg the Pygmy Goat, Tam the Tamandua, and their host Maria-Maria. Boss is told not to go to Corporate War by Board Baby Emiliano, so Boss tries to provoke his enemies to make the first move.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business S2 - EP 40
programme.desc: Boss promises Tim he'll help make their parents' anniversary present, but after Puppy Co. and Baby Corp's fight over a conference room escalates, he sends Hendershot is his stead. Hendershot, armed with a file on all of Tim's wants and needs, tries to keep Tim happy.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants S2 - EP 42

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge S2 - EP 31
programme.desc: Astrid comes down with the Odin's Revenge flu and the Riders must search for the cure by finding a nearly extinct Buffalord dragon before Viggo does.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge S2 - EP 32
programme.desc: The Riders head to a tropical island for fun in the sun, not realizing it's infested with Grimora Leeches which drives their dragons to turn on them.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Paws Of Destiny S1 - EP 1
programme.desc: After absorbing the mystical Hero Chi of the Four Constellations, four panda kids enlist the Dragon Master to teach them Kung Fu

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Paws Of Destiny S1 - EP 2
programme.desc: When the kids grow over-confident after beginning their training, they decide to intercept a distress call and sneak off without permission, only to land themselves in hot water

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Paws Of Destiny S1 - EP 3
programme.desc: Po and the kids are recruited to perform in Mei Mei's theatrical show, but things take a turn when Jindiao ruins the play in order to find a mystical scroll

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia S1 - EP 2
programme.desc: Jim warms up to the idea of being the Trollhunter until he faces Bular, who is determined to destroy him, so he seeks help in Blinky and AAARRRGGHH!!

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia S1 - EP 3
programme.desc: Jim is not welcomed by the Trolls as their new Trollhunter, and he suffers a humiliating defeat at the hands of Draal

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 21
programme.desc: It’s revealed that Cleve is building a massive weather machine that is generating dangerous desert storms, with the help of a genius North African teen named Ziri. When Cleve creates a sandstorm to take out the crew, they’re saved by two Bedouin brothers named Kareem and Salem (and their pack of camels). Echo questions her ability to be a good leader and if they should give up.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 22
programme.desc: The kids manage to make it through the crazy storm and build gliders out of parts of the fallen spy plane to travel closer to Cleve’s base and save Nowhere and Gary. Cleve sees the kids on his satellite feeds and sends a bunch of drones to take them out. During the aerial battle, Cisco splits off and leads the drones away so that the rest of the crew can escape, causing him to be lost alone in the giant storm

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 23
programme.desc: The kids hatch a plan to take down Cleve and rescue Ms. Nowhere and Gary. Meanwhile, despite interference from Ziri, Cleve successfully begins to launch his satellites into space, which will allow him to use his weather machine to destroy Earth’s major cities and transform the Sahara into the only oasis. In order to stop the satellites, the team engages in an all-out battle against Cleve, Matsuo, and Rafaela.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia S1 - EP 1
programme.desc: The evil General Morando launches a coup on the alien planet Akiridion-5. In the ensuing battle, the planet's King and Queen are severely injured, and their surviving son Krel and daughter Aja escape the planet with military commander, Varvatos Vex. They seek refuge on a backwater planet: Earth.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia S1 - EP 2
programme.desc: Aja, Krel, and Vex explore Earth looking for technology to repair their ship. When the high school Principal demands to meet Aja and Krel's guardians, the Royal teens transform two maintenance robots (Blanks) to pose as their "human" parents.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia S1 - EP 3
programme.desc: In an effort to blend in with their surroundings, Krel engineers a device to get into the "mind-set" of humans and ends up discovering far more than he expected. Meanwhile, General Morando's bounty hunters close in on the Royals.

programme.desc: The competitive pinball-wizard Wolfe brothers meet coin-op king Dirk at his giant poultry barn turned private arcade. Mike and Robbie enter a hangar full of ultra-rare games and choice carnival relics.

programme.title: The Food That Built Asia - EP 7
programme.desc: The sushi episode delves into the story of one of Japan's most popular dishes. The episode examines the history of sushi, from its humble beginning as a method of preserving fish.

programme.title: The Food That Built Asia - EP 8
programme.desc: The episode examines the history of tempura from Nagasaki tempura, the prototype of today's tempura derived from fritters brought to Japan by 16th-century Portuguese/Spanish traders and missionaries.

programme.title: The UnBelievable With Dan Aykroyd (S2) - EP 15
programme.desc: We've heard the tales of prison breaks, but these aren't your average escapes. From a man who frees himself all thanks to a fruit to a Soviet pilot that evades capture by stealing the enemy's plane.

programme.desc: A set of replica Muppets has Chum feeling green with envy; but will going gonzo over these land him the goods? Meanwhile, Rick flips over an autograph book from the 1800s, but are the signatures the real?

programme.title: The Food That Built The World (S4) - EP 42
programme.desc: Two entrepreneurs rise from the ashes of Prohibition by staking everything on two liquors and go on to save an industry, change cocktail culture, and create two of the most popular brands in the country.
